framework_stage1.root_cause: Security/runtime invariants remain in the certification gate. Repository-optimization ledgers and version snapshots are advisory release tooling rather than organism security invariants.

evidence.technical_fusion_acceptance: authenticated offline attach -> heartbeat -> defusion -> 14/14 addon and 90/90 framework Stage-1 PASS
verification_warnings: MacroDroid YAML parses successfully; MacroDroid semantic import/runtime correctness remains unverified and is not a Python release gate.
READY is a software engineering verdict, not deployment fusion authority.

resolved_requirements.resolution: The complete framework receipt is 20/20 Stage-1 rows and 90/90 executable security invariants.

ResidentConfig.authorize_phase2 requires a complete fresh target-bound Stage-1 receipt, READY engineering verdict, explicit reproduction denial, and an authenticated authority provider. Caller-authored approval JSON alone remains powerless.

ResidentRuntime owns transactional fusion, redacted durable receipts, replacement refusal, fail-closed rollback, authority-free idempotent defusion, startup recovery, and a verified offline attach-heartbeat-defuse-post-Stage-1 acceptance path.

Exactly one lifecycle-owned CognitiveScheduler uses the fixed 600-second baseline. Observer hooks run Body-only pulses; queued significant/distress wakeups are additional and do not move the natural deadline.
HermesModel calls PluginContext.llm without provider/model overrides, so Hermes owns active routing, fallback, authentication, and credentials.
CognitionPolicy enforces bounded output, rolling token/cost budgets, serialized calls, bounded transient retries, exponential backoff, timeout/outage behavior, and redacted usage receipts.
HmacAuthorityProvider verifies distinct operator and guardian credentials and target-bound signatures. No production approval or key is bundled; deployment activation remains separately deferred.
Core, vendor, addon, tests, and doctrine state that technical evidence and release readiness never grant fusion authority.

operational_activation_requirements.requirement: Generate a fresh Stage-1 PASS and READY report bound to the concrete resident identity and Body fingerprint.
Obtain separate fresh operator and guardian APPROVED records signed with distinct configured authority credentials.
Keep reproduction false unless separately designed, reviewed, and authorized.

next_action.action: Publish the software release after clean-checkout verification. Do not fuse a production MIND without the separate operational activation requirements.

decision_rule: READY authorizes software publication only. Runtime fusion still requires fresh target-bound evidence plus independently authenticated operator and guardian approvals.
